name: log-message
description:
Logs request/response payloads and headers inline in real time by default, or emits a single latency-enriched line per request in an optional stdout traffic-logging mode.
By default (enableTrafficLogging: false) it logs inline in real time during mediation, including per-chunk streaming. Set enableTrafficLogging: true to instead opt the API into stdout traffic logging, where the traffic-logging publisher emits a single JSON line per request enriched with access-log-derived latencies (requires the collector and traffic logging to be enabled).
Supports separate configuration for request and response flows.
